chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. Nos.D-171 and 172 of 2021 Muhammad Yousuf Channa & Syed Yaseen Hussain Shah Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 1806/21 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on CMA 896/21 4. For orders on CMA 897/21 5. For hearing of main case Dated: 22.01.2021 Mr. Pardeep Kumar for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners submits that petitioners in both the petitions have sought independent/competent inquiry officer to be appointed to conduct fair inquiry. This could hardly be a ground to entertain these petitions since no allegations have been shown against the concerned officials conducting the inquiry except the fact that there was some typing error insofar as show-cause notice and suspension order is concerned. Even otherwise this would not be considered to be a fact which would demonstrate conduct of the inquiry officer as being a dishonest person. Both the petitions being misconceived are accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. Petitioners may however shall be subjected to lawful inquiries for onward consideration. Judge Judge
